notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to access your account

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.sessionInvalid: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
errors.noLocationsAssigned: No locations are assigned to your account. Contact your administrator.
errors.tenantAccessLost: We couldn't verify your location access. Please sign in again.
errors.authError: There was a problem verifying your session. Please sign in again.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The authentication service is unavailable. Please try again or contact your administrator.

offline.noNetwork: I'm not connected to a network. Check your internet connection and try again.
offline.serverUnavailable: You're connected to a network, but IDS AI Skeleton is temporarily unavailable. Some features may not work correctly until the service is available again. Please try again. If the issue persists, contact your IDS administrator.

errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Try refreshing the page. If the issue persists, please contact your IDS administrator.

verifyingPermissions: Please wait while we verify your permissions
locationChangePrompt: Changing the location will navigate away from this page and may result in any unsaved data being lost. Are you sure you want to proceed?
